questions.question: Compare and explain the difference between Stumping and Boosting in the context of ensemble learning.
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of each method

questions.question: Describe the concept of Bagging and its advantages over other ensemble methods. Provide a specific example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the concept of bagging and its applications

questions.question: Explain the concept of Subagging and how it differs from traditional Bagging. Provide a code example to demonstrate the implementation.
questions.hint: Focus on the key differences between subagging and traditional bagging
